title: Endless Day
description: Allows you to change the speed of the day, as well as make the sun move in the opposite direction.
body:
Commands:
/eday s_day - Speed of day [Default:1] (min:-20, max:20)
/eday t_day - Time shift [Default:1] (min:1, max:5)
/eday play - Daily cycle [Default:falce]

First you need to disable the daily cycle with the command "/gamerule doDaylightCycle falce"
Then set the settings with the commands "**/eday s_day**" and "**/eday t_day**" and start the day cycle with the command "**/eday play true**"

- To make a day an hour long, set **s_day** to 3
- Or **s_day** to 9 and **t_day** to 3

This is my first fully functional mod and I'm going to continue to develop it.
If the mod gains popularity, I'll make it so that the night can be edited separately

If the day is not coming, switch s_day to +1 and back
